title: Better Bone Meal
description: Fabric and Forge! New bone meal items for easier plant farming and more!
body:
## Better Bone Meal
**This mod adds new "**fertilizer**" items that behave like bone meal**

These also have a larger radius ***depending on the size of the bag***.
This mod is helpful for farmers and creative players,
because the mod also adds a slingshot, this only the
Fertilizer or bone meal bag throws.
So an area can be planted quickly

![Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/OxQhQgN.png 'Recipes to craft the items')
![Recipes2](https://i.imgur.com/FiLvDiS.png 'Recipes to craft the items')

<center>
